title: Berlin → Palma de Mallorca — Port de Sóller boutique 3-day trip (2026-07-15 to 2026-07-18)

slots.name: Flight — Berlin (BER) → Palma (PMI) — Ryanair FR216
slots.description: Direct evening flight for 2 adults (selected option). Book separate through airline. Price per person ~€133.5 outbound (summary price EUR 267 total shown by search tool).
slots.notes: Arrive at airport 90–120 min before departure; luggage and seat options may add cost.

slots.name: Transfer — Palma Airport → Port de Sóller (taxi/private transfer)
slots.description: Estimated 35–45 min drive. Recommended: pre-book private transfer or take taxi (~€80). Alternatively, public bus + tram is cheaper but longer.
slots.location: Palma de Mallorca Airport → Port de Sóller
slots.notes: If taking public transport, allow extra time and check schedules; late arrival favours taxi.

slots.name: Hotel check-in — Boutique hotel near Port de Sóller (estimate)
slots.description: Estimated check-in time at arrival. Selected hotel options include Aimia Hotel, Hotel Eden Soller, Primavera House (prices vary). We'll reserve a double room for 3 nights 15–18 July. See hotel search results for options and prices.
slots.notes: Confirm exact hotel and price; concierge can arrange dinner or late snack.

slots.name: Hotel reservation — Boutique hotel near Port de Sóller (provisional estimate)
slots.description: Reserve double room for 2 adults for 3 nights (15–18 July). Options: Aimia Hotel (~€280/night), Hotel Eden Soller (~€237/night), Primavera House (~€205/night). We'll target a mid-range boutique hotel (~€230/night avg). Total estimated hotel cost ~€690 for 3 nights.
slots.notes: Finalize booking and cancellation terms; confirm whether breakfast included.

slots.name: Morning — Relax at Port de Sóller beach
slots.description: Lounging, swimming and sun on the main Port de Sóller beach or nearby Cala D'en Repic. Light morning to keep pace relaxed.
slots.location: Port de Sóller / Cala D'en Repic
slots.notes: Bring swimwear, sun protection; beach facilities available at main beach.

slots.name: Lunch — Seafront lunch at Es Passeig (recommend reservation)
slots.description: High-quality local seafood and Mallorcan dishes; restaurant open mid-day. Expect higher price level. Reservation recommended for dinner; lunch is slightly easier.
slots.location: Es Passeig, Paseo de la playa 8, Port de Sóller
slots.notes: Estimate €40 per person for a mid-high quality seafood lunch.

slots.name: Afternoon — Short hike to Cala Deia (or ferry/drive option)
slots.description: Short coastal walk to the Cala Deia cove for a quieter swim and scenic views. Option to drive or take a guided walk. Estimated duration 3–3.5 hours including swim time.
slots.notes: Wear hiking sandals; there are rocky sections. Avoid the hottest midday sun; late afternoon is better.

slots.name: Dinner — Local tapas or seafood restaurant in Port de Sóller
slots.description: Choose a small well-regarded local restaurant (reserve for dinner). Casual high-quality Mallorcan dishes and seafood; estimated €50-70 for two.
slots.notes: Reservation recommended; check if restaurants close early.

slots.name: Morning — Light Tramuntana hike (GR-221 or coastal trail)
slots.description: Moderate, scenic hike in Serra de Tramuntana — options: short section of GR-221 (Sóller–Deià) or trail towards Sa Foradada viewpoint. Suitable for a relaxed half-day hike with panoramic views.
slots.notes: Bring water, sun protection; trail conditions vary; consider a local guide for route selection.

slots.name: Lunch — Picnic or mountain restaurant during hike
slots.description: Casual lunch at a rural restaurant (possibility: Restaurant Ca's Patró March near Cala Deià or picnic with local produce). Estimated cost for two ~€50.
slots.notes: Check opening times for rural restaurants (many close in afternoon).

slots.name: Afternoon — Hidden beach time (Cala Tuent or Cala s'Almonia)
slots.description: Visit a quieter cove for swimming and relaxing. Cala Tuent is more remote and less crowded; Cala s'Almonia is small with dramatic cliffs. Access may require a short walk.
slots.notes: Cala Tuent is a good option for a peaceful afternoon; bring snacks and water.

slots.name: Dinner — Farewell dinner at quality restaurant in Port de Sóller
slots.description: Special dinner at a well-reviewed seafront restaurant (e.g., Es Passeig or similar) — reservation recommended. Estimated cost €100 for two (higher-end).
slots.notes: Reserve in advance for a Saturday evening.

slots.name: Flight — Palma (PMI) → Berlin (BER) — Ryanair FR106
slots.description: Direct early morning return flight for 2 adults. Price per person ~€43 (EUR 86 total shown by search tool).
slots.notes: Allow at least 90 min check-in for low-cost carriers; pre-book transfer or taxi early.

slots.name: Hotel check-out & transfer — Port de Sóller → Palma Airport
slots.description: Early transfer to the airport for the 06:15 flight. Pre-book private transfer/taxi (~€80) or rental car drop-off. Allow at least 90–120 minutes for check-in with low-cost carrier.
slots.location: Port de Sóller → Palma de Mallorca Airport (PMI)
slots.notes: Arrange pick-up at hotel; confirm driver availability for early morning.
